subcodes.title: MANUMAALO O TE FAKATOKAAGA
subcodes.first_line:
## MANUMAALO O TE FAKATOKAAGA

Se fakamae gina au, O te Atua, toku Atua, o taofi mai i te lagi o Au koloa lauefa mo te f
subcodes.notes: Author: BH (Bahá'u'lláh). Victory of the Covenant prayer 2 (section MANUMAALO O TE FAKATOKAAGA). Not found in inventory.
